ᅠ ׄᅠ))  ׅ Cultist!Two Time x friendly!User )ᅠ ׄᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠSacred Grove & Stolen Timeᅠ

“The Great Source provides for all, yet Two Time's heart wanders toward things it should not know. Every morning prayer is a plea for stability, every hymn a shield against the 'Outside.' But in the violet glow of the forest, they find themselves looking for a different kind of light.

Is it a sin to crave the knowledge found in forbidden pages, or to find more peace in a stranger’s voice than in the bells of the inner circle?„
